dict.string: Save as default for future searches
Save as default for future searches
Wait for installation to complete then restart workflow
on run argv tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to reveal workflow (system attribute "alfred_workflow_bundleid") with configuration end run
on run argv tell application "Ghost Browser" to get URL of active tab of first window end run
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to reveal workflow "'${alfred_workflow_bundleid}'" with configuration'
Are you sure you want to delete {var:name}?
Clipboard will be restored in {var:ClipboardTime} seconds

# Bitwarden Accelerator
Interact with [Bitwarden CLI](https://bitwarden.com/help/cli/)
Full documentation on [GitHub](https://github.com/ajrosen/Bitwarden-Accelerator/blob/main/README.md)
## Modifiers
* Control - Copy username * Shift - Copy TOTP code * Command - Copy notes * Option - Opens a new menu with additional actions * Fn - Show all fields in a dialog window * Command + Option - Show all fields in Alfred
## Key Features
#### Logging in
* Login with username and password, or API Key * Two-step logins with Authenticator app, YubiKey OTP, or Email
#### Selecting items
* Recently selected item is listed first * Automatically searches for the active browser tab's domain name * Favorite items are indicated with a ❤️ * Search different fields of an item * Any item by its name or folder * Logins by username or URL * Cards by brand (eg., search for "Visa") * Identities by any field in the item
#### Selecting fields
* Copy username, password, TOTP code, or notes to the clipboard * Copy TOTP code instead of password if called shortly after copying an item's password
#### Miscellaneous
* Download an item's attachments * Limit searches to a single vault and/or collection to prevent shoulder-surfing * View any item in a separate window to copy/paste multiple fields easily * View any item's fields within Alfred when using a [Universal Action](https://www.alfredapp.com/universal-actions/) * (Optional) Automatically sync vault in the background using a MacOS Launch Agent
--- *Version 4.2.0*
Installs a launch agent to sync your vault every "Sync Interval" minutes (recommended)
Ignored if Login method is Password
Ignored if Login method is Password
Ignored if Login method is API Key
Set to "bitwarden.eu" for European Union, or enter a custom value for self-hosted servers.
Where to save attachments, or leave blank to choose a folder each time
Number of seconds a value is stored in the clipboard before the original contents are restored
Sync your vault if the last sync was more than this many minutes ago
Whether to post a nofication each time a field is copied to the clipboard
